svg.title: Aurum — full CI/CD pipeline
svg.desc: All four GitHub Actions workflows shown as a single connected diagram: CI, Security, ArgoCD CD, and Dependabot.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What triggers the CI pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What triggers the security workflow?')
sendPrompt('What does the frontend lint job do in CI.yml?')
sendPrompt('What does the frontend build job do in CI.yml?')
sendPrompt('How does the secrets scan work with TruffleHog and GitLeaks?')
sendPrompt('What does CodeQL analyse in the security workflow?')
sendPrompt('What does the npm audit dependency check cover?')
sendPrompt('What does the code quality job check with ESLint and Prettier?')
sendPrompt('What does Semgrep scan for in the security workflow?')
sendPrompt('What happens inside the build-and-scan job?')
g.text: Trivy · Grype → SARIF to GitHub Security

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the security summary job report?')
sendPrompt('What triggers the ArgoCD sync workflow?')
sendPrompt('How is the ArgoCD CLI installed?')
sendPrompt('What secrets does ArgoCD login require?')
sendPrompt('What application does ArgoCD sync?')
sendPrompt('How long does ArgoCD wait for app health?')
sendPrompt('What does a healthy ArgoCD deployment mean?')
sendPrompt('When does Dependabot run?')
sendPrompt('What Python dependencies does Dependabot update?')
sendPrompt('What GitHub Actions does Dependabot update?')
sendPrompt('How are Dependabot PRs assigned and labelled?')
